title: T-079 — UI: ApprovalScreen (ApprovalScreen prototype) — 7-criteria summary + chain status + Submit-for-approval (NPD-i)
prompt:
# T-079 — Approval screen UI

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.5 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md approval_screen
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx:412-475 (ApprovalScreen)

## Goal
Client component ApprovalScreen at /(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]?stage=approval rendering 2 cards (gates summary + chain status), 7-criteria summary card with Done/Awaiting/Pending badges, Submit-for-approval CTA gated on all 7 pass.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/approval/page.tsx (RSC) reads project + evaluateApprovalCriteria result + approval chain template.
2. ApprovalScreen renders: gates summary Card (G3/G4 status), chain status Card (single vs multi), 7-criteria badge grid (C1-C7), Submit-for-approval Button disabled unless all C1-C7='pass'.
3. Submit calls existing approveProjectGate with e-signature flow (T-061 modal reuse).
4. RTL parity test against prototype + Submit gating.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/approval/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/approval/_components/approval-screen.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/approval/_components/criteria-card.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/approval/_components/__tests__/approval-screen.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production ApprovalScreen renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx:412-475 (ApprovalScreen), then it has the same 2 cards (gates summary + chain status) + 7-criteria summary card using shadcn Card + Badge primitives — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist
2. Given evaluateApprovalCriteria returns one criterion as 'pending', when the screen renders, then the Submit-for-approval Button is disabled per §17.11.5 gate condition
3. Given all 7 criteria return 'pass' and user clicks Submit, when the GateApprovalModal opens, then approveProjectGate is invoked on e-sign per §17.11.5 + §17.6 e-sig flow

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/approval-screen.test.tsx asserting parity + Submit gating + e-sig invocation before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test approval-screen'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow Submit when any criterion ≠ 'pass'
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not bypass GateApprovalModal e-sig flow

pipeline_inputs.description: Approval stage screen with 7-criteria summary + chain status + Submit-for-approval CTA gated on all pass.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity checklist: gates summary + chain status cards, 7-criteria badge grid, Submit gating, e-sig modal reuse. Sensory, if shown as one of the approval criteria, must be consumed as Technical-owned status/read-model; do not build NPD sensory schema/UI here.

Do not implement NPD sensory schema/UI; sensory belongs under Technical

Given evaluateApprovalCriteria returns one criterion as 'pending', when the screen renders, then the Submit-for-approval Button is disabled per §17.11.5
Given all 7 criteria return 'pass' and user clicks Submit, when the GateApprovalModal opens, then approveProjectGate is invoked on e-sign per §17.11.5 + §17.6

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
